## Summary

Describe the problem and the solution.

## Validation

List the checks you ran and any important manual verification.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and includes relevant tests or documentation.
- [ ] `make check` passes, or the reason it was not run is explained above.
- [ ] No credentials, personal data, local paths, or unrelated generated files are included.
- [ ] User-facing behavior remains local-first and reviewable.
